title: Sunseeker Manhattan 68
description:
This 2025 Sunseeker Manhattan 68 is a 21.21-meter British flybridge motor yacht powered by twin MAN V8 engines up to 1,200 HP with a top speed of 32 knots.

Accommodating up to 8 guests across 4 cabins plus crew, her full-beam aft galley opens seamlessly to the cockpit via sliding doors, while the owner's suite benefits from its own private staircase. Bow and stern thrusters with joystick docking are standard.

Currently located in Dubai. Contact us for full specifications and a private viewing appointment.
